phoneticUs: 藢semi藢蓴藧t蓹藞m忙t瑟k; 藢sema瑟藢蓴藧t蓹藞m忙t瑟k
examples: Its engine is coupled to a semiautomatic gearbox.
This washing machine is automatic, and the others are semiautomatic.
The shooters used semiautomatic weapons they obtained illegally.
The Bushmaster M4 Types Carbine, a semiautomatic rifle, uses a 20 or 30-round magazine.
The suspect also bought an AR-15 semiautomatic rifle, a military-style gun popular with sportsmen.
